rules.description: When the door lock is opened, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the outside door light and porch light.

raw.description: When the door lock is opened, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the outside door light and porch light.

rules.description: When the door lock is closed, turn off the porch light and greenhouse light.

E_A.reason: Greenhouse light is turned off in R15.

raw.description: When the door lock is closed, turn off the porch light and greenhouse light.

rules.description: When the porch motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the porch light.

raw.description: When the porch motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the porch light.

rules.description: When the living room motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the living room light.

E_A.reason: Turning on a light increases environmental illumination.
Entity is a light switch; 'turn_on' increases light level in the room.

raw.description: When the living room motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the living room light.

rules.description: When the kitchen motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the kitchen light.

E_A.reason: Turning on a light increases environmental illumination.
Entity is a light switch; 'turn_on' increases light level.

raw.description: When the kitchen motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the kitchen light.

rules.description: When the bedroom motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the bedroom light.

raw.description: When the bedroom motion sensor is triggered, if the brightness sensor is below 50lux, turn on the bedroom light.

rules.display_alias: R2-Greenhouse Light Re-enable and Door Unlock
rules.alias: R2-Greenhouse Light Re-enable and Door Unlock
rules.description: If the greenhouse light is turned off, open the door lock and turn the porch light back on.

raw.alias: R2-Greenhouse Light Re-enable and Door Unlock
raw.description: If the greenhouse light is turned off, open the door lock and turn the porch light back on.

rules.description: When the living room humidity is below 40%, and the humidifier is off, turn on the living room humidifier.

E_A.reason: Humidifier is turned on when humidity is low (R5), implying it adds moisture.

raw.description: When the living room humidity is below 40%, and the humidifier is off, turn on the living room humidifier.

rules.description: When the living room humidity is above 60%, and the humidifier is on, turn off the living room humidifier.

E_A.reason: Turning off humidifier stops increasing humidity (natural decrease).

raw.description: When the living room humidity is above 60%, and the humidifier is on, turn off the living room humidifier.

rules.description: When the living room temperature is below 24℃, and the living room floor heating is off, turn on the living room floor heating.

E_A.reason: Floor heating is turned on when temperature is low (R7), implying it heats the room.

raw.description: When the living room temperature is below 24℃, and the living room floor heating is off, turn on the living room floor heating.

rules.description: When the living room temperature is above 30℃, and the living room air conditioner is off, turn on the living room air conditioner and set it to 27℃.

E_A.reason: AC turns on in high heat to cool the environment.
Air conditioner is turned on when temperature is high (R8), implying it cools the room.

raw.description: When the living room temperature is above 30℃, and the living room air conditioner is off, turn on the living room air conditioner and set it to 27℃.

rules.description: When the water leak sensor is triggered, turn off the central water valve.

E_A.reason: Central water valve is turned off to stop water flow (R10).

raw.description: When the water leak sensor is triggered, turn off the central water valve.

rules.description: When the smoke alarm is turned on, turn on the fire sprinkler.

E_A.reason: Water suppresses fire and smoke generation.

raw.description: When the smoke alarm is turned on, turn on the fire sprinkler.

rules.description: At 7 PM, turn on the bedroom heating.

E_A.reason: Bedroom heater is turned on at 7PM (R13), implying it heats the room.

raw.description: At 7 PM, turn on the bedroom heating.

rules.description: When the bedroom temperature reaches 30℃, open the window and turn off the heating.

E_A.reason: Opening window during high heat usually facilitates cooling.
Window opens at high temperature (R14), likely to cool the room.

raw.description: When the bedroom temperature reaches 30℃, open the window and turn off the heating.

rules.description: At 7 PM, turn on the greenhouse heating.

E_A.reason: Greenhouse heater is turned on at 7PM (R16), implying it heats the room.

raw.description: At 7 PM, turn on the greenhouse heating.

rules.description: When the greenhouse temperature reaches 32℃, open the window and turn off the heating.

E_A.reason: Opening window during high heat usually facilitates cooling.
Window opens at high temperature (R17), likely to vent and cool the room.

raw.description: When the greenhouse temperature reaches 32℃, open the window and turn off the heating.
